title: veronica rotunda f. albiflora
intro: Veronica rotunda f. albiflora, also known as the white flowered round-leaved speedwell, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Veronicaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Veronica rotunda f. albiflora include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
